summary: Tested Quality Score Calculation v2 (Controlled Chaos) - Backend: 10/10 tests passed (1 skipped). Frontend: Dashboard and Contests page working correctly. Found and FIXED 2 bugs in /api/films/social/feed endpoint during testing.
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py (fixed 2 bugs in get_social_feed endpoint: line 4778 missing user_id handling, line 4792 cast format handling)

success_rate.backend: 100% (10/10 tests passed, 1 skipped - no films ready for release)
success_rate.frontend: 100% - Login, Dashboard, Contests page all working

seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing test user fandrex1@gmail.com
context_for_next_testing_agent: Quality Score v2 formula implemented and migration completed. Film quality distribution now averages ~44 (was 74.2). Tier assignments: >=85 masterpiece, >=70 excellent, >=55 good, >=40 mediocre, <40 bad. Films have advanced_factors with alchemy labels like visione_regista, pubblico, chimica_cast, critica, trend_genere. Two bugs fixed in social feed endpoint: 1) KeyError when film missing user_id (now uses owner_id fallback), 2) AttributeError when cast contains non-dict items.

TestFilmQualityV2Distribution.test_get_user_films_quality_distribution: PASSED - User films have valid quality scores
TestFilmQualityV2Distribution.test_social_feed_films_quality_distribut: PASSED - Social feed avg quality 44.0 (in expected 30-70 range)
TestFilmQualityV2Distribution.test_films_have_correct_tiers: PASSED - Tier assignments match quality thresholds

TestAdvancedFactors.test_films_have_advanced_factors_field: PASSED - Films have advanced_factors with alchemy labels

TestIMDbRatingRecalculation.test_imdb_correlates_with_quality: PASSED - IMDb correlates with quality score

TestFilmPipelineRelease.test_get_shooting_films_for_release: PASSED - Endpoint returns films in shooting phase

frontend_tests_executed.contests_page_mobile: PASSED - 10 contest cards visible, proper stacking on 375x812 viewport

bugs_fixed_during_testing.issue: KeyError: 'user_id' when film document missing user_id field
bugs_fixed_during_testing.fix: Added fallback to owner_id: owner_id = film.get('user_id') or film.get('owner_id')

bugs_fixed_during_testing.issue: AttributeError: 'str' object has no attribute 'get' when cast contains non-dict items
bugs_fixed_during_testing.fix: Added isinstance check: if not isinstance(actor_info, dict): continue
